\section*{URF Unified Template (Final)}

\[
T(\alpha) =
\begin{cases}
\Omega(n) & \alpha < 1 \\
\Omega\!\left(\dfrac{n}{\log n}\right) & \alpha = 1 \\
O(\log n) & \alpha > 1
\end{cases}
\]

\[
\Sigma = \Sigma_{\mathrm{ker}} \oplus \Sigma_{\mathrm{acc}},\quad
\Pi_{k,R}(\Sigma_{\mathrm{ker}})=0
\]

\[
T \ge \frac{H(I^\ast)}{\operatorname{Cap}_{\mathrm{step}}(\alpha)}
\]

Applications:
- Distributed Systems: consensus lower bounds under locality
- Quantum Topology: logical stability via kernel protection
